title: clerodendrum sessilifolium
intro: Clerodendrum sessilifolium, also known as the sessile leafed glorybower, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clerodendrum sessilifolium include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
